uplink.description: 0x5c Motion data — presence detected when sending (action.motion.detected true)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (presenceDetectedWhenSending=true, status frameCounter=4, presence/luminosity sample %).

uplink.description: 0x5c Motion data — no presence, low battery flag set (action.motion.detected false)
uplink._note: Synthetic; status byte 0x02 sets lowBattery; presence byte 0 => detected false. Derived via reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic; globalCounterValue=5 => action.motion.count. Derived via reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: 0x4f Motion presence alarm — alarm implies detection plus counter
uplink._note: Synthetic; presence alarm => detected true, globalCounterValue=7 => count. Derived via reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic; 0x30 keep-alive carries no motion measurement, so this normalized codec rejects it.
